mapper.sql: select edit_id, manuscript_id, editor_id, editor_name, edit_status, edit_start_time, edit_end_time, edit_content, edit_suggestion, format_check, word_count_before, word_count_after, version, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from editor_edit
mapper.insert: insert into editor_edit ( manuscript_id, editor_id, editor_name, edit_status, edit_start_time, edit_end_time, edit_content, edit_suggestion, format_check, word_count_before, word_count_after, version, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{manuscriptId}, #{editorId}, #{editorName}, #{editStatus}, #{editStartTime}, #{editEndTime}, #{editContent}, #{editSuggestion}, #{formatCheck}, #{wordCountBefore}, #{wordCountAfter}, #{version}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update editor_edit set edit_status = #{editStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where edit_id = #{editId}
mapper.delete:
delete from editor_edit where edit_id in
#{editId}
